articles.title: Yuan Rallies Most in 10 Months as PBOC Strengthens Fix Into NPC
articles.snippet: The yuan rallied after the People’s Bank of China signaled its comfort with the currency’s appreciation via its daily reference rate, ahead of the National People’s Congress.

combined_text:
[0.33] Yuan Rallies Most in 10 Months as PBOC Strengthens Fix Into NPC
The yuan rallied after the People’s Bank of China signaled its comfort with the currency’s appreciation via its daily reference rate, ahead of the National People’s Congress.
